name: The Week With Grugles
short_description: A Brand New Horror Attraction Is Now Under Your Watch! You are the security guard, and you must use your cameras and close the doors to keep any unexpected guests out of your office!
detailed_description:
A Brand New Horror Attraction Is Now Under Your Watch!

Grugles House Of Horror is soon to open for business! In the meantime, we need you to keep watch of the place and make sure nobody tries to get in, or out...

You are the night guard of a new attraction in this horror game! Beware, you may get unexpected visitors during your shift, make sure you keep them away!

Make sure Grugles and his friends don't get into your room by closing the doors, check on River often to keep her at bay, click on Gaxter whenever he appears on the cameras and make sure that the Monkey is always wound up

Use the cameras to see where everyone is, and check the room next to your office to see if anyone is at the door!

Features:

A fun point-and-click survival horror experience, unique mechanics, and scary jumpscare!

Warning! This game contains loud noises, flashing lights, and lots of jumpscares!

“Grugles Entertainment is not responsible for any dismemberment on shift, any injuries will result in termination of employment.” -Grugles Entertainment
